title: Conditional Formatting on Number Widgets
excerpt: It would be great to conditionally format the background or text color on Number widgets based on their value.  This could be extended to other widgets as well. Basically duplicate what is available on boards today into …

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to conditionally format the background or text color on Number widgets based on their value. This could be extended to other widgets as well. Basically duplicate what is available on boards today into Dashboards.

posts.author: Jonatas (Jonatas Santos)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! … did you get any answer from Monday.com team on this?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Jonatas - nothing as of yet
